data: {"response": {"candidates": [{"content": {"role": "model","parts": [{"thought": true,"text": "**Prioritizing Tool Specificity**\n\nI'm focusing intently on tool specificity. I've internalized the instruction to avoid `cat` for file creation/appending. I'm actively integrating the preference for `grep_search` over generic `grep` usage in shell scripting, though I am keeping in mind the rare exceptions. I'm ensuring I don't use the `DO NOT` command; I understand its intention.\n\n\n"}]}}],"usageMetadata": {"promptTokenCount": 62912,"totalTokenCount": 62912},"modelVersion": "gemini-pro-default","responseId": "kLMLat6JFrqCg8UP7ofsoQk"},"traceId": "5b58fe9ba63278af","metadata": {}}

data: {"response": {"candidates": [{"content": {"role": "model","parts": [{"thoughtSignature": "","functionCall": {"name": "write_to_file","args": {"Description": "Check what brace line 383 closes","CodeContent": "const fs = require('fs');\nconst content = fs.readFileSync('f:/AUDIRA-ROUTET/open-sse/translator/request/openai-to-kiro.js', 'utf8');\nlet depth = 0;\nconst stack = [];\nconst lines = content.split('\\n');\nfor (let i = 0; i \u003c lines.length; i++) {\n  let line = lines[i];\n  \n  line = line.replace(/\"[^\"]*\"/g, '\"\"');\n  line = line.replace(/'[^']*'/g, \"''\");\n  line = line.replace(/`[^`]*`/g, \"``\");\n  line = line.split('//')[0];\n\n  for (let j = 0; j \u003c line.length; j++) {\n    const char = line[j];\n    if (char === '{') {\n      depth++;\n      stack.push(i + 1);\n    }\n    if (char === '}') {\n      depth--;\n      const closed = stack.pop();\n      if (i + 1 === 383) {\n        console.log(`Line 383 '}' closes brace from line ${closed}`);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\nconsole.log('Final stack of unclosed braces:', stack);\n","IsArtifact": false,"Overwrite": true,"TargetFile": "f:\\AUDIRA-ROUTET\\check_braces.js"},"id": "4ukn4qav"}}]}}],"usageMetadata": {"promptTokenCount": 62912,"candidatesTokenCount": 363,"totalTokenCount": 63567,"thoughtsTokenCount": 292},"modelVersion": "gemini-pro-default","responseId": "kLMLat6JFrqCg8UP7ofsoQk"},"traceId": "5b58fe9ba63278af","metadata": {}}
